source_ref.compose_env_source: existing external 211 runtime env file supplied through compose --env-file; values were not copied or printed
source_ref.deployment_note: runtime-only image rebased from the previous healthy image because dependencies did not change; compose used --no-build with the reviewed image tag. Container labels still record the old external env-file path, so this evidence must not be used as G0 source-authority closure.

review_notes: This entry records a reviewed Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the 6088d5d Foundation Alpha POC runtime.
The API and worker containers reported image ai-platform:6088d5d-alert-trace-acceptance with matching source revision, runtime subject, and OCI revision labels before the smoke was recorded.
The reviewed summary omits credentials, connection strings, object locators, executor-only internals, runtime workspace paths, real user identifiers, and personal workstation paths.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline for 6088d5d only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, packaged frontend image release acceptance, signed Skill package/SBOM, or G0 source-authority parity while labels still record the old external env-file layout.
open_followups: Broader auth/session/RBAC/tenant/redaction regression remains required before production gate closure.
#21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
Signed package or SBOM review evidence for Skill release remains open.
Repo-local deploy environment layout must be reconciled before G0 source-authority closure.
